info.description: This is the WorkLayer API documentation.
info.title: WorkLayer API

post.description: Authenticate a user and return access and refresh tokens.
Invalidate the user's session and clear authentication cookies.
Get a new access token using a valid refresh token from cookies.
Create a new user account with email, password, and full name.
Check if the current session (access token) is still valid.

get.description: Check the status of the API.
List organizations the user is a member of.

post.description: Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.
Accept an invitation to join an organization

get.description: Get all pending invitations for the authenticated user's email
get.summary: Get pending invitations for current user

post.description: Guided onboarding flow for creating a new organization.

get.description: Retrieve organization details by slug. User must be a member.
Retrieve organization details by ID. User must be a member.

delete.description: Permanently delete an organization. Requires Owner role and name confirmation.

patch.description: Update organization details (name, description, slug). Requires Admin+ role.

post.description: Deactivate (archive) an organization. Requires Admin+ role.

get.description: Get all invitations for an organization

post.description: Create a new invitation to join an organization
Regenerate token and reset expiry for a pending invitation

get.summary: Get all members of an organization

delete.summary: Remove a member from the organization

get.summary: List all projects of an organization
Get a specific project by ID

put.summary: Update a specific project by ID

delete.summary: Delete a specific project by ID

get.summary: List all API keys for a project
Get a specific API key by ID

post.summary: Archive a specific project by ID

get.summary: List all members of a project

post.summary: Add a new member to a project

get.summary: Get the current member of a project

delete.summary: Remove a member from a project

post.summary: Change the role of a member in a project
Restore a specific project by ID

post.description: Reactivate a previously archived organization. Requires Admin+ role.

get.description: Get the profile information of the currently authenticated user.
